title: Aider
author: Aider
copyText:
## Editorial notes

Aider is a practical option for developers who want tight Git-centered AI editing without adopting a new editor.

## Disclosure

Editorial listing. No paid placement or affiliate link is used.
detailMarkdown:
# Aider

Open-source terminal coding assistant that edits files in Git repositories using chat-driven development loops.

## Trust
- Source: source-backed
- Package: no package download
- Review: unclaimed
seoDescription: Aider is an open-source terminal coding assistant that edits files in Git repositories through chat workflows. HeyClaude adds source links, install steps,...
